description_long: This trolleybus features a classic, rectangular body with a dark roof and a deep brown lower section, accented by large, evenly spaced windows along both sides. The roof is equipped with a single pantograph pole for overhead electric wire connection, and several rooftop hatches or vents are visible. The front and rear ends are slightly rounded, each with a central headlight and a set of steps leading up to the entry doors. The windows are framed in a lighter color, providing contrast against the darker body panels. The undercarriage includes visible wheel assemblies and protective grilles. The overall design suggests a vintage or heritage-style trolleybus, suitable for urban public transportation.
description: A vintage-style brown trolleybus with large windows, a dark roof, and a single pantograph pole for overhead electric power.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the trolleybus, large windows, and the pantograph pole on the roof.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded front, central headlight, and entry steps.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the windows and pantograph pole from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the rounded back, central light, and rear entry steps.
